HavenRise Realtors — Luxury Real Estate in Nairobi, Kenya

HavenRise Realtors is Nairobi's premier luxury real estate agency, specialising in exclusive off-plan and ready properties across Lavington, Westlands, Kilimani, Riverside, Runda and Kiambu. Properties from KES 6,900,000 with flexible payment plans.

📞 +254 728 686 089  |  ✉ havenriserealtors@gmail.com  |  📍 Ciata City Mall, Ridgeways, Block B, 2nd Floor, Nairobi

Off-Plan Apartments for Sale — Nairobi

  • A-One Pandora — Lavington luxury apartments, from KES 6.9M
  • Panorama West Residence — Westlands apartments
  • Balkis Residences Riverside — premium riverside apartments
  • Amethyst Springs — Kilimani luxury apartments
  • Lesto Residences — Westlands contemporary apartments

Houses & Villas for Rent — Nairobi

  • 5-bedroom house for rent — Runda, Nairobi
  • 7-bedroom Runda Acacia residence for rent
  • 4-bedroom gated home — Kiambu Road

Neighbourhoods We Serve

  • Lavington properties
  • Westlands properties
  • Kilimani properties
  • Riverside properties
  • Runda properties
  • Kiambu properties

Our Services

  • Luxury property sales — off-plan and ready units
  • Premium rental listings across Nairobi
  • Property selling and listing services — list your property
  • Developer partnerships and off-plan marketing — developers page
  • Investment advisory and property management

Our Story

About
HavenRise

Nairobi's premier real estate agency — redefining luxury property with trust, expertise, and a relentless commitment to our clients.

Scroll

Est. 2014

Our Mission

Where Every Client
Finds Their Place

At HavenRise, we believe that finding the right property is one of life's most significant milestones. Founded in Nairobi, we've grown into the city's most trusted boutique real estate agency — connecting buyers, renters, and investors with properties that truly fit their lives.

We combine deep local market knowledge, a curated off-market network, and exceptional personal service to deliver an experience that goes far beyond the transaction. From Westlands to Lavington, Kilimani to the Coast — we are with you every step of the way.

Get in Touch

Properties Listed

300+

Happy Clients

10+

Years Experience

7

Services Offered

Why Choose Us

The HavenRise
Difference

Six pillars that set us apart in Nairobi's competitive real estate market.

01

Trusted Expertise

Years of industry experience helping clients make confident property decisions across Nairobi and beyond.

02

Premium Listings

Carefully curated properties that meet modern lifestyle standards — including exclusive off-market opportunities.

03

Client-First Approach

Transparent communication and personalised support from first enquiry through to final handover.

04

Diaspora Specialists

We handle the entire buying or selling process remotely, so you can transact from anywhere in the world.

05

Legal Integrity

Every transaction is backed by top-tier property lawyers ensuring clean, risk-free title transfers.

06

No Hidden Fees

Our fee structure is disclosed upfront. No surprises, no commissions buried in the fine print.
